records.ety: [L. faciens, -- entis, p. pr. of facere to make, do. See Fact.]

defs: One who does anything, good or bad; a doer; an agent.
One of the variables of a quantic as distinguished from a coefficient.
notes: ☞ The terms facient, faciend, and factum, may imply that the multiplication involved is not ordinary multiplication, but is either some specified operation, or, in general, any mathematical operation. See Multiplication.
